items.text: Bro, just apply a little amount of vim bar on a soft scrubber or a little piece of cloth then push it into the bottle and then shake it well. After removing it, clean the bottle with water and your bottle will be cleaned. no extra things are needed. also there would be no smell. same method for every types of bottle.
Better to clean every day. Why let so much dirt to accumulate??
Can you please also do a video on cleaning clay water bottle? It is very difficult due to small mouth and not allowed to use detergent.
